sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n56963" key="kestrofu/lac" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κεστρο-φύλαξ</orth> [<foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ῠ], <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ακος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen></foreign>, <sense id="n56963.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">officer in charge of</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">κέστροι</quote_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">11</biblScope></bibl></cit>, ib.<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1094</biblScope></bibl>, al.:—hence <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κεστρο-φῠλᾰκέω</orth>, ib.<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">735</biblScope></bibl>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">736</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
